name: dhpk
description: Reusable Claude Code harness — 27 role-based agents (26 root + 1 module-scoped reviewer; incl. the Swift/Xcode build-resolver, the silent-failure-hunter error-handling auditor, and Python/Rust build-resolvers) + ~45 registered dhpk commands (44 root + the ts-check-status JS-module command; the bundled codex / gitnexus / git trees ship their own separately) + opt-in stack modules across PHP (5.6, 7.4, 8.x), Yii (1.1), PHPUnit (5.7, 9, 10, 11), Laravel (5.4, 6–11), JS, Vue 2, Laravel Mix 5, Python (python lint/type-check hooks, fastapi, pytest), the library-author cross-cutting module, and an iOS/Swift suite (swift, swiftui, ios-platform, swift-testing, xcode-tooling) with SwiftLint post-edit + xcodebuild/SPM pre-commit hooks, a Swift 6.2 approachable-concurrency reference, and an ios-icon-gen skill. 7-slot sentinel-driven review hooks (code / db / sec / frontend / doc / polyfill / migration — polyfill via library-author, migration via module triggers or mig: extra paths; doc-reviewer covers both SSOT/link-validity and frontmatter schema for .md DSL artifacts), parameterised docker/agent names, wrapper-dispatch hook extension model, parallel Codex CLI tree.

hook_profile.title: Hook profile
hook_profile.description: Verbosity of hook output: minimal | standard | strict

review_agents.title: Review agent names
review_agents.description: Seven agents invoked by sentinel reminders (slots: code, database, security, frontend, doc, polyfill, migration). Override to point at project-specific agents. Shorter overrides are padded with the defaults for the remaining slots.

deep_reasoner_model.title: deep-reasoner model
deep_reasoner_model.description: Model tier for dhpk:deep-reasoner Agent-call dispatches (see "Configured role models" under rules/execution-policy.md §Agent dispatch) — applied per dispatch via the Agent call `model` param when it differs from the agent's frontmatter default. Valid values: at minimum haiku | sonnet | opus (whatever the running Claude Code version supports). An invalid value warns once per session and falls back to the frontmatter default; it never fails the dispatch. Default 'opus' (the shipped frontmatter default).

fast_worker_model.title: fast-worker model
fast_worker_model.description: Model tier for dhpk:fast-worker Agent-call dispatches (see "Configured role models" under rules/execution-policy.md §Agent dispatch). Same validation/fallback behavior as deep_reasoner_model. Default 'sonnet' (the shipped frontmatter default).

orchestration_dispatch.title: Implementation dispatch switch
orchestration_dispatch.description: 'on' (default) routes implement-phase work through the Implementation dispatch decision table in rules/execution-policy.md — deep-reasoner for reasoning-heavy work, fast-worker for mechanical work with a clear spec, inline for small (~2-file) diffs; dispatching general-purpose for implementation is prohibited while this is on. 'off' is a full kill switch restoring pre-change behavior exactly: inline implementation, no dispatch prohibition, no opsx-apply-goal directive line.

deep_reasoner_effort.title: deep-reasoner effort
deep_reasoner_effort.description: Reasoning effort for dhpk:deep-reasoner Agent-call dispatches (see rules/model-economics.md master cost rules) — applied per dispatch via the Agent call `effort` param when it differs from the agent's frontmatter default. Valid values: low | medium | high | xhigh | max (whatever the running Claude Code supports). An invalid value warns once per session and falls back to the frontmatter default; it never fails the dispatch. Default 'high' (the shipped frontmatter default).

fast_worker_effort.title: fast-worker effort
fast_worker_effort.description: Reasoning effort for dhpk:fast-worker Agent-call dispatches (see rules/model-economics.md master cost rules). Same validation/fallback behavior as deep_reasoner_effort. Default 'medium' (the shipped frontmatter default); the decision layer runs higher and execution de-escalates.

docker_containers.title: Docker containers
docker_containers.description: Container names checked at SessionStart. Empty list disables the check.

modules.title: Stack modules to enable
modules.description: Enable stack modules from modules/. Ships: php-5.6, php-7.4, php-8.x, yii-1.1, phpunit-5.7, phpunit-9, phpunit-10, phpunit-11, laravel-5.4, laravel-6, laravel-7, laravel-8, laravel-9, laravel-10, laravel-11, js, vue-2, laravel-mix, library-author, python, fastapi, pytest, swift, swiftui, ios-platform, swift-testing, xcode-tooling. Module 'requires' validated at SessionStart (warning only). Stack selection is additive for php / laravel / phpunit — library packages spanning versions should enable each version in their composer constraint to get cumulative guidance. Enabling 'js' wires the ESLint post-edit hook + pre-commit lint/typecheck gate; enabling 'php-7.4' wires the php-cs-fixer post-edit hook + pre-commit lint+phpstan+psalm gate; enabling 'python' wires a post-edit ruff hook (batched at Stop) + a pre-commit ruff-check/ruff-format/type-check (pyright|mypy) gate — project root auto-detected by walking up to pyproject.toml (set python_project_roots=backend for a subdir backend); 'fastapi' / 'pytest' are skills+references only (fastapi adds db/sec path triggers) and each `requires: python`; enabling 'library-author' wires the sixth-color `polyfill-reviewer` sentinel for multi-major PHP libraries spanning Laravel 6-11 / Monolog 2-3 / PHPUnit 8-11 / Flysystem 1-3 (see modules/library-author/module.yaml for guard_patterns / skip_paths config). iOS suite: enabling 'xcode-tooling' wires the SwiftLint post-edit hook + pre-commit xcodebuild/SPM build+test gate (both self-skip when swiftlint/xcodebuild are absent); swift / swiftui / ios-platform / swift-testing are skills+references only (no hooks). The iOS suite is dependency-chained — swiftui / ios-platform / swift-testing / xcode-tooling each `requires: swift`. Precedence: a project's .claude/settings.local.json (or settings.json) `pluginConfigs.dhpk@dhpk.options.modules` OVERRIDES the global value — supports a single dev machine working on projects with different stacks.

review_trigger_extra_paths.title: Extra review trigger paths
review_trigger_extra_paths.description: Extra path prefixes per reviewer slot, formatted '<slot>:<prefix>' where slot ∈ code|db|sec|fe|doc|mig. Example: 'code:protected/', 'fe:resources/views/', 'mig:db/migrate/'

hot_tables.title: High-volume table names
hot_tables.description: Project-specific high-volume / hot table names that performance-analyzer and migration-reviewer treat as elevated risk (large-ALTER downtime, N+1, missing composite index). The agents ship POS-system examples only; declare your project's real hot tables here (or in CLAUDE.md / .claude/rules/). Example: 'orders', 'order_lines', 'inventory'. Default empty = rely on the agents' generic heuristics + CLAUDE.md.

js_lint_script.title: JS lint npm script name
js_lint_script.description: npm script invoked by modules/js/hooks/pre-commit-js-validation.sh. Default 'lint'. Override when the project uses a non-standard script name (e.g. 'lint:strict').

js_check_path.title: JS @ts-check scan path
js_check_path.description: Path scanned by the /ts-check-status command. Default 'js/'. Override for projects laying out JS under e.g. 'src/' or 'app/javascript/'.

python_project_roots.title: Python project roots
python_project_roots.description: Subdirs holding a pyproject.toml that the python module's hooks should lint (e.g. 'backend'). Default empty — the hooks walk up from the edited file to the nearest pyproject.toml, which already handles monorepo backends. Set this only to RESTRICT linting to specific subtrees (ignore stray top-level scripts). Read by modules/python/hooks/_lib/python-env.sh.

python_runner.title: Python tool runner prefix
python_runner.description: Command prefix used to invoke ruff / pyright / mypy inside the project env (modules/python/hooks/*). Default 'uv run'. Set 'poetry run' for Poetry, or '' to run tools straight off PATH (already-activated venv). When the runner's binary is absent the hooks fall back to bare PATH tools, then self-skip if those are missing too.

ruff_bin.title: ruff binary name
ruff_bin.description: ruff executable invoked by modules/python/hooks/{post-edit-python-lint.sh,stop-py-batch-check.sh,pre-commit-python-validation.sh}. Default 'ruff' (via the runner, or bare on PATH).

python_typechecker.title: Python type checker
python_typechecker.description: Type checker the python module's pre-commit gate runs on staged .py: 'pyright' (default), 'mypy', or 'none' to skip type-checking. ccas runs pyright strict.

pyright_bin.title: pyright binary name
pyright_bin.description: pyright executable used when python_typechecker=pyright. Default 'pyright' (via the runner, or bare on PATH).

mypy_bin.title: mypy binary name
mypy_bin.description: mypy executable used when python_typechecker=mypy. Default 'mypy' (via the runner, or bare on PATH).

swiftlint_bin.title: SwiftLint binary path
swiftlint_bin.description: Binary invoked by modules/xcode-tooling/hooks/post-edit-swiftlint.sh. Default 'swiftlint' (resolved on PATH). Override for a non-standard location or a wrapper. The hook self-skips when the binary is absent.

xcode_scheme.title: Xcode scheme
xcode_scheme.description: Scheme used by modules/xcode-tooling/hooks/pre-commit-swift-build.sh for `xcodebuild build`/`test`. Default empty — when empty and an Xcode project is present, the build gate is skipped (no scheme guessing). Set to the app scheme (e.g. 'babylon') to enable the gate.

xcode_destination.title: Xcode test destination
xcode_destination.description: `-destination` for the *test* step of the pre-commit gate (modules/xcode-tooling/hooks/pre-commit-swift-build.sh). The *build* step always uses a device-name-free `generic/platform=iOS Simulator`, so it never goes stale. Default empty — the test step then auto-picks the first available iOS simulator, so a stale named default never breaks the gate. Set e.g. 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' to pin a specific simulator (must be installed — see `xcrun simctl list devices available`).

swift_build_skip_tests.title: Skip tests in the Swift pre-commit gate
swift_build_skip_tests.description: When true, modules/xcode-tooling/hooks/pre-commit-swift-build.sh runs build only (no `xcodebuild test` / `swift test`). Default false (build + test).

php_cs_fixer_bin.title: php-cs-fixer binary path
php_cs_fixer_bin.description: Binary invoked by modules/php-7.4/hooks/pre-commit-php-validation.sh. Default 'vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer'. Override for non-standard locations (global install, docker exec wrapper, monorepo shared bin).

phpstan_bin.title: phpstan binary path
phpstan_bin.description: Binary invoked by modules/php-7.4/hooks/pre-commit-php-validation.sh when phpstan.neon[.dist] is present. Default 'vendor/bin/phpstan'.

psalm_bin.title: psalm binary path
psalm_bin.description: Binary invoked by modules/php-7.4/hooks/pre-commit-php-validation.sh when psalm.xml[.dist] is present. Default 'vendor/bin/psalm'.

reap_stale_mcp_processes.title: Reap stale gitnexus MCP processes
reap_stale_mcp_processes.description: When enabled, SessionStart kills ORPHANED gitnexus mcp processes (parent session dead / reparented to init). Processes owned by a live parallel session in the same repo are never killed. Off by default — only useful for projects that use the gitnexus MCP server.

sentinel_commit_gate.title: Sentinel commit gate mode
sentinel_commit_gate.description: Behaviour when `git commit/merge/rebase/cherry-pick` runs while reviewer sentinels are pending: warn (stderr reminder, exit 0) | block (reject the tool call, exit 2) | off (silent). Default 'warn'. Env DHPK_SENTINEL_COMMIT_GATE overrides this for one-shot toggles. Companion to pre-bash-guard's git-push hard block.

branch_safety.title: Protected branch safety mode
branch_safety.description: Behaviour when a history-mutating git verb (commit/merge/rebase/cherry-pick/reset/push) runs on a protected branch: warn | block | off. Default 'warn'. Env DHPK_BRANCH_SAFETY overrides for one-shot toggles.

protected_branches.title: Protected branch names / globs
protected_branches.description: Branches treated as protected by the branch_safety gate. Glob syntax supported via bash case-match (e.g. 'release/*'). Default: main, master, develop, release/*, hotfix/*. Set to empty list to disable per-branch gating without setting branch_safety=off.

skill_hint_enabled.title: Enable UserPromptSubmit skill hint
skill_hint_enabled.description: When true (default), the userpromptsubmit-skill-hint hook prints a one-line suggestion mapping the user prompt to the most likely dhpk command (e.g. 'bug' → /dhpk:bug-fix). Set false to silence. Env DHPK_DISABLE_SKILL_HINT=1 overrides for one-shot disable.

learning_db_enabled.title: Enable cross-session learning DB
learning_db_enabled.description: When true, hooks append signals (reviewer pass via clear-sentinel, subagent failure, abnormal stop) to an append-only .claude/artifacts/learning.jsonl, and SessionStart surfaces the top recurring signatures as a [learned-context] block (capped at 5 lines). Confidence is derived per signature with recency decay; the log self-rotates past 50MB. Default false (opt-in) — zero behaviour change until a project turns it on. Env DHPK_LEARNING_DB=1/0 overrides for one-shot toggles.

graduation_scan_enabled.title: Enable knowledge graduation scan
graduation_scan_enabled.description: When true, a Stop hook scans the session transcript for cited auto-memory entries (~/.claude/projects/<slug>/memory/<entry>.md), maintains cross-session counts + confidence in .claude/artifacts/memory-usage-counts.json, and regenerates .claude/artifacts/graduation-candidates.md (bootstrapped from the plugin template on first run). Entries cited ≥3 times across ≥24h/≥3 dates without trap re-occurrence are proposed for promotion to a rule/skill; in OpsX projects, high-confidence entries also auto-draft a change skeleton. Requires python3. Default false (opt-in). Env DHPK_GRADUATION_SCAN=1/0 overrides for one-shot toggles.

lockfile_sync_commands.title: Lock-file sync commands
lockfile_sync_commands.description: Per-manifest lock-sync commands for the post-edit manifest-guard reminder, entries shaped '<manifest>:<command>' (e.g. 'composer.json:docker exec -i my_php composer update --lock'). Manifests without an entry fall back to a generic default (composer update --lock / npm install / bundle install / cargo build / poetry lock). Commands must not contain commas.

php_bin.title: PHP binary
php_bin.description: PHP binary or wrapper command used by the php-5.6 module's post-edit syntax check (php -l), e.g. 'docker exec -i my_php php'. The hook silently skips when the command's first word is not on PATH.

completion_evidence_enabled.title: Enable completion-evidence Stop advisory
completion_evidence_enabled.description: When true, a Stop hook warns when the assistant claims completion while the working tree has source-code changes with no matching test changes (doc-only / harness-only changes are exempt; active review sentinels defer to the sentinel reminder). Advisory only — never blocks Stop. Default false (opt-in). Env DHPK_COMPLETION_EVIDENCE=1/0 overrides for one-shot toggles.

agent_warmstart_enabled.title: Enable subagent warmstart context
agent_warmstart_enabled.description: When true, a PreToolUse (Task|Agent) hook injects parent-session context into subagent prompts: active review sentinels + reviewer slots, the most recent OpenSpec change + first tasks, the project's .claude/warmstart-context.md (first 800 chars), and a tool-routing reminder — capped at 2000 chars. Costs tokens on every subagent spawn. Default false (opt-in). Env DHPK_AGENT_WARMSTART=1/0 overrides for one-shot toggles.

harness_restore_hint.title: Harness restore hint
harness_restore_hint.description: Command line printed by the SessionStart broken-symlink advisory when symlinks directly under .claude/ are dangling (for projects deploying the harness via symlinks from a separate repo). Empty disables the hint line (the WARN itself still prints).

js_frontend_roots.title: JS frontend root directories
js_frontend_roots.description: Project override for the js module's tier detection: root directories scanned for first-party JS/TS. Empty falls back to modules/js/module.yaml (default [js, src]).

js_core_files.title: JS core files
js_core_files.description: Project override for the js module's tier detection: basenames at the top of a frontend root that are first-party entry bundles (linted/reviewed) rather than vendor. Example: ["app.js", "main.js"]. Empty falls back to module.yaml.

js_vendor_globs.title: JS vendor globs
js_vendor_globs.description: Project override for the js module's tier detection: glob path prefixes treated as vendored (lint-skipped at any depth), e.g. ["js/ckeditor/", "js/jquery-*"]. Globs must not contain commas. Empty falls back to module.yaml.
